upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra vAcamindurizyati' (f॰9.12.6) prezyati prerayati prayojayati aprEzId
'rAjaputrI mAM surAhArI tavAntikam' (BA॰vi॰16.4) prEzId vyasrAkzIt ityAha
'ArzwizeRena sfzwA devApinA prezitAH' (f॰10.98.6)
'yAtuDAnaprezitAH' (Sa॰brA॰7.4.1.29) prezitAH prAstA muktA ityarTaH
'raTantaraM gAyeti prezyati' (kA॰SrO॰4.9.7) prezyatyAdiSatItyarTAntaram
'na hi prakfzwAH prezyante prezyante hItare janAH' (rA॰5.39.39 5.68.22) Sizyanta AjYApyante ityevArTaH
'muktA jAlapraticCannAn prEzItkarRaraTaM prati' (BA॰karRa॰81.3) vyasarjayadityarTaH
'sASvaM sasUtaM tvaritaH pArTaH prEzIdyamakzayam' (BA॰droRa॰28.8) ukta evArTaH
'prezayAmi mahAvegamastramasya vinASane' (rA॰3.35.46)
'prEzizadrAkzasaH prAsam' (Bawwi॰15.77)
'cintayitvA tu pArTeByaH prezayizyAmi saYjayam' (BA॰u॰21.20) Ryantasya prapUrvasya izeH sa evArTo yo'Ryantasya
'snigDaM vIkzitamanyato'pi nayane yatprezayantyA tayA' (SA॰2.2) prezayantyA vyApArayantyA
'sa ca me prezayAmAsa SEvaM Danuranuttamam ..mahyaM vE dIyatAmiti' (rA॰1.71.17) satarjanaM praboDayAmAsetyarTaH
'prezayantIva vE dAsIrdAsAMSca viviDAn bahUn' (BA॰vi॰9.9) prEzaM kArayantI svAminI satItyarTaH
'ityuktvA DarmarAjAya prezayAmAsa vE tadA' (BA॰ASrama॰8.10) puruzaM prezayAmAsa DarmarAjo yuDizWira AkAryatAm ihAnIyatAmiti ezA saMskfte BaRitaBaNgI atrAvaDAtavyam
'duHSAsanAya subahUn prezayAmAsa sAyakAn' (BA॰BIzma॰117.42) prAsa visasarja mumoceti vA'rTaH
'raTaM SvetahayEryuktaM prezayAmAsa saMyuge' (BA॰BIzma॰84.47) Aja prAja aByAjeti vArTaH
'prezitastadEva pratipadyeta' (Apa॰Da॰1.7.25) prezitaH Sizwo BavatyAjYapto vA
'taTA pracakrustatsarvaM rAjYA yatprezitaM tadA' (rA॰1.11.25) prezitaM prEzaH rAjYA yadAdizwaM tatsarvaM kartumAreBira ityarTaH
'tamizwiBiH prEzamEcCan' (E॰brA॰1.2) prEzamanvezwum ityAha tumarTe Ramul anvarTe praSabdaH
'izitA dEvyA hotAro BadravAcyAya prezito mAnuzaH (hotA) sUktavAkAya' (Sa॰brA॰1.9.1.1) prezitaH ketito nimantrita ucyate
nEte jAtu nivarteran prezitA hastisAdiBiH (BA॰droRa॰ 112.18) prezitAH prAjitAH
'tAnprEzamEcCat tAnnAvindat' (caYca0 brA0 1447) prEzam anvezwum
'aTApi jAnantaM samprezyatyagnaye samiDyamAnAyAnubrUhi' (ni0 1158) samprezyati=prezyati=AdiSati=AjYApayati
'yiyAsatastataH kfzRaH pArTasyASvAnmanojavAn samprEzIdDemasaMCannAn…' (BA0 droRa0 281) samprEzIt=prAjIt=samayaMsIt
'aTAtaH samprezyati' (Sa0 brA0 9231) samprezyati=AdiSati=AjYApayati
'na KalvezA matirmahyaM yattvAM samprezayAmyaham' (rA0 54312) samprezayAmi niyojayAmi
'tAmadya samprezya parigrahItuH' (SA0 422) visfjyetyarTaH
'aTa samprezitAsTAnaH sacivAnabravInnfpaH' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 51) samprezitAsTAnaH=visfzwasadAH
'asya vratezvapi soma izyate' (f0 9691) apIzyate'nvizyate mfgyate tatprAptO prayatyate
'asatyasanDasya sataScalasyAsTiracetasaH nEva devA na pitaraH pratIcCantIti naH Srutam' (rA0 210918).. pratIcCanti parigfhRanti aByupayanti
'tadahaM kiYcid BavataH prArTaye yadi pratIcCasi' (tantrA0 112) pratIcCasi aByupEzi bAQaM karizyAmIti cetpratijAnIza ityarTaH
'goRIM janena sma niGAtumudDftAmanukzaRaM nokzataraH pratIcCati' (SiSu0 1210) na pratIcCati nANgI karoti ukzataro vfdDokzaH pA0 5391 sUtreRa tanutve dyotye svArTikaH zwarac
'BakzyAn dvijendrErapi sampradattAnnEva pratIcCanti viBorBayena' (vAma0 pu0 913) ukto'rTaH
'uzRArto hi naro yadvajjalaDArAH pratIcCati' (BA0 BIzma0 11724) pratIcCati grahItumicCati
'hanta gfhRa pratIcCeti tAvuBO yoDasattamO' (hari0 27344) gfhRa gfhARa pratIcCa dehi prahAramiti SezaH
'pratIcCa matkftaM DarmaM yadi te mayyanugrahaH' (BA0 SAM0 19983) pratIcCa gfhARa
'pratIcCatyA SokIM kisalayaparAvfttimaDaraH' (Bojapra0 172) pratIcCati gfhRAti Adatte
'atrAgatya svavAsAMsi pratIcCantu SucismitAH' (BA0 pu0 102216) svasyEvArTasya pratyAditsA pratIcCASabdArTaH
'eza upahAraramaRIyatayA mADavImaRqapaH svAgateneva nO pratIcCati' (SA0 6) pratIcCati pratigfhRAti saBAjayati
'eza Kalu tvAM pratIcCati' (vikrama0 2) ukto'rTaH
'aTA'nyezu pratIcCAmi' (Apa0 Da0 18226) pratIcCAmi anvizyAmi AptumIhe
'gadA SakrajitA jiGye tAM pratIyeza vAlijaH' (Bawwi0 1436) pratIyeza pratijagrAha ruroDa jiGya iti hinoteranupasfzwasya karmaRi liwi rUpam loke kevalasya hinoteH prayogo durlaBa iti mataM naH
'aTa pravfttirAgacCet pratIcCet samAtrayam' (kftyakalpatarO dvitIye sampuwe pf0 59 kAtyAyanIyaM vacanamityudDftam) pratIcCet pratIkzeta
'tena pApAnubanDena vacanaM na pratIcCatA' (rA0 1334) na pratIcCatA na svIkurvatA na gfhRatA nAnutizWatA nAnuvidaDatA
'sa tadbARamayaM varzamaSmavarzamivAcalaH pratIcCan pARqudAyAdaH' (BA0 droRa0 12765).. pratIcCan pratigfhRan runDAnaH
'tataH SarasahasrARi pratIcCantO raReziRO' (hari0 24333) ukto'rTaH
'sato banDumasati niravindan hfdi pratIzyA kavayo manIzA' (f0 101294) pratIzyA pratIzya anvizya sAMhitiko dIrGaH
'devasya SAsanaM pratIzya' (SA0 6) pratIzya svIkftya anumatya 'satkAro nAma satkAreRa pratIzwaH prItiM janayati' (svapna0 4)
'sa hovAca BagavantaM vA ahameBiH sarvErArtvijyEH paryEzizam' (CAM0 u0 1112) paryEzizamamArgayam
'dozaM hyezAM nADyagacCaM parIcCan' (BA0 u0 224) parIcCan anvizyan parIkzamARaH
'SrUyatAM yaH prayatno me sItAparyezaRe kftaH' (BA0 vana0 28217) paryezaRamanvezaRaM vicayaH
'brAhmaRezveva meDAvI budDiparyezaRaM caret' (BA0 vana0 2618) budDiparyezaRaM budDeH sAkalyena saNgrahaRam
'bADanA'nivfttervedayataH paryezaRadozAdapratizeDaH' (vyAya0 4157) paryezaRaM prArTanA vizayArjanatfzRA parericCArTasya izerlyuwi rUpam
'hIyamAnena vE sanDiH paryezwavyaH samena vA' (BA0 Salya0 443) paryezwavya ezwavyaH
'anvagacCad DanuzpARiH paryanvezwumitastaH' (BA0 Adi0 4014) paryanvezwuM parito' nvezwuM vicetum
'yadaDvaryurhotAramupa prezyati' (E0 brA0 65) upaprezyati=upahItyAhvayati
'upaprEzo nimantraRaM Bavati taTA cEtareyake' (25) prayogaH--tadyanmatrAvaruRa upaprEze pratipadyate
